settings.heading: Refund & Returns Policy
settings.content:
We want you to love what you ordered. If something isn't quite right, you have 30 days from the day your order arrives to return it for a refund.

Return Window

You have 30 days from delivery to request a return. EU customers also have a statutory 14-day cooling-off period on top of our standard return window.

What Can Be Returned

To qualify for a refund, items must be:

  • unused and unworn;
  • in their original packaging;
  • with all original tags still attached;
  • accompanied by proof of purchase (order number or confirmation email).

What Can't Be Returned

  • Final-sale or clearance items;
  • Gift cards;
  • Personalised or custom-made items;
  • Items that have been used, washed, altered, or damaged by the customer.

How to Start a Return

Email hello@yourstore.com with your order number and a short description of the reason for your return. We'll reply within 2 business days with the return address and step-by-step instructions.

Return Shipping

You are responsible for the cost of return shipping unless the item arrived damaged, defective, or incorrect. We recommend using a tracked service — we can't refund items that are lost on their way back to us.

A flat return-handling fee may apply; this will be communicated when we approve your return. The fee is waived for defective or incorrect items.

Damaged, Defective, or Incorrect Items

Please inspect your order as soon as it arrives. If anything is damaged, defective, or not what you ordered, contact us within 48 hours of delivery and include photos. We'll replace it or refund it — whichever you prefer — and cover the return shipping.

Exchanges

The fastest way to get the colour, size, or style you wanted is to place a new order and return the original item for a refund once you receive the replacement.

When Your Refund Arrives

Once we receive and inspect your return, we'll email you to confirm the outcome. Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 10 business days. Depending on your bank, it can take an additional 3–5 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.

Late or Missing Refunds

If you haven't received your refund within 15 business days of our confirmation email, please first check with your bank and then email us at hello@yourstore.com so we can chase it on our end.

Contact

Any questions: hello@yourstore.com.
